FOUNDRY_VOICE_CONTROL.IpAllowlist.Name: IP allowlist
FOUNDRY_VOICE_CONTROL.IpAllowlist.Hint: Comma-separated CIDRs allowed to call the module API. Leave empty for no restriction. Loopback is always allowed.
FOUNDRY_VOICE_CONTROL.UrlAllowlist.Name: Image URL allowlist
FOUNDRY_VOICE_CONTROL.UrlAllowlist.Hint: Comma-separated hosts that may serve images via set_token_image / set_actor_image. Leave empty to disable URL-based image fetching (paths under user data still work).
FOUNDRY_VOICE_CONTROL.RespectOwnership.H: When enabled, find_actor and list_items hide actors with restricted ownership for non-GM-scope keys.
